title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech examines whether Google engineers use "vibe coding" practices, comparing code generation approaches between OpenAI's Codex and Claude, and exploring vibing trends at Google across 2024-2026. The content covers what counts as vibing and how different companies approach code generation.
